claim_under_attack: The platform strategy and challenge review contain a material contradiction on Q2 feasibility, and the three named issues make full-scope Q2 completion infeasible.
evidence_or_reason: The artifact does not show any visible text from either source document proving that the strategy explicitly commits full billing migration by end of Q2 or that the challenge review classifies all three issues as blockers rather than risks. It also jumps from issue listing to 'Q2 infeasible' without evidence on severity, mitigation lead time, or whether any issue could be closed within Q2. That makes the contradiction and infeasibility judgment under-supported from the visible record.
